hypothesis: A liquidity-qualified gap-down recovery shadow universe can surface non-overlapping event-sensitive candidates with better multi-window forward returns than prior news-coverage-limited scouts, without adding tickers to production.
single_causal_variable: liquidity-qualified gap-down recovery shadow candidate definition rerun after log id collision
locked_variables: liquidity-qualified gap-down recovery shadow candidate definition rerun after log id collision; no production universe changes
acceptance_rule: observed_only shadow mode; must report candidate count, data coverage, liquidity, same-day A/B overlap, 5d/10d/20d forward returns, scarce-slot proxy, and survivorship/noise risks before any production replay
